items.title: Millions of Bees Have Thrived Under a New York Cemetery for More Than a Century
items.summary: A walk in the cemetery led to Cornell researchers discovering an underground colony of bees with an estimated population of 5.5 million—one of the largest ever recorded.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Report warns that cybercriminals are exploiting Cockroach Janta Party’s popularity to con GenZ
items.summary: The 33-page report flagged a fake Android app posing as CJP’s official app as a malware threat capable of hacking devices and stealing user data
